hero.purpose: One-per-page landing headline. Display caps, fluid clamp(3rem, 11vw, 11rem).

display.purpose: Section and step titles, ALL CAPS.

body.purpose: Mono body copy, deck text. Max ~38–60ch.

label.purpose: Mono labels, buttons, chips, eyebrows. Tracking 0.18em.

meta.purpose: Mono meta lines: seeds, step counters, timestamps.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions, scroll-driven reveals, tile lift.

motion.name: ease-out-fast
motion.purpose: Short feedback on hover/focus state changes (150–180ms).

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: Square accent button used for primary actions (Open generator, export). Mono label, ALL CAPS, no radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: oklch(66% 0.16 28); color: oklch(8% 0.012 42); font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 16px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; min-height: 44px; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: oklch(80% 0.022 68); color: oklch(8% 0.012 42); } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(66% 0.16 28); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Square mono chip used for aspect-ratio and category filters. Inverts to active state (Ash Text fill, Ink BG text).
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(24% 0.018 42); color: oklch(50% 0.018 68); font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 14px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 36px; border-radius: 0; transition: color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out, background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-chip:hover { color: oklch(80% 0.022 68); border-color: oklch(40% 0.02 42); } .ds-chip--active { color: oklch(8% 0.012 42); background: oklch(80% 0.022 68); border-color: oklch(80% 0.022 68); } .ds-chip__count { font-size: 0.65rem; opacity: 0.7; }

components.name: Example Tile
components.description: Square-cornered tile presenting a generated cover. Resting outline keeps it readable on Ink BG; hover lifts 2px and shifts outline to accent.
components.html: SEED #31415OPEN ↗
components.css: .ds-tile { display: block; cursor: pointer; outline: none; text-decoration: none; } .ds-tile__frame { position: relative; width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; background: oklch(12% 0.01 42); overflow: hidden; outline: 1px solid oklch(18% 0.012 42); outline-offset: 0; border-radius: 0; transition: outline-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-tile:hover .ds-tile__frame { outline-color: oklch(66% 0.16 28); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-tile__img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .ds-tile__overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, oklch(4% 0.005 42 / 0.96) 0%, oklch(4% 0.005 42 / 0.18) 58%, transparent 75%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 12px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 180ms ease-out; pointer-events: none; } .ds-tile:hover .ds-tile__overlay { opacity: 1; } .ds-tile__seed { font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; color: oklch(50% 0.018 68); letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-tile__cta { font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: oklch(66% 0.16 28); letter-spacing: 0.06em; }

components.name: Slider Track
components.description: Mixing-desk style range input. Ink Border track, accent fill, square thumb. Used throughout the generator for effect parameters.
components.css: .ds-slider { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 18px; background: transparent; outline: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(to right, oklch(66% 0.16 28) 0%, oklch(66% 0.16 28) 34%, oklch(24% 0.018 42) 34%, oklch(24% 0.018 42) 100%); border-radius: 4px; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 12px; height: 12px; background: oklch(80% 0.022 68); border: none; border-radius: 4px; margin-top: -4.5px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-slider:hover::-webkit-slider-thumb { background: oklch(66% 0.16 28); } .ds-slider:focus-visible::-webkit-slider-thumb { outline: 2px solid oklch(66% 0.16 28); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Layer Row
components.description: Sortable row in the generator's layer panel. Drag handle, mono label, square edges. Selected state uses a 1px accent hairline on the left edge — never a colored stripe.
components.html:
⋮⋮▒Scanlines○
⋮⋮≋Halftone●
components.css: .ds-layer { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px; min-height: 36px; font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: oklch(80% 0.022 68); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(24% 0.018 42); border-left: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-layer:hover { background: oklch(11% 0.016 42); } .ds-layer--selected { border-left-color: oklch(66% 0.16 28); background: oklch(66% 0.16 28 / 0.05); } .ds-layer__drag { color: oklch(50% 0.018 68); cursor: grab; letter-spacing: -2px; } .ds-layer__icon { color: oklch(66% 0.16 28); width: 14px; text-align: center; } .ds-layer__name { flex: 1; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-layer__action { color: oklch(50% 0.018 68); width: 14px; text-align: center; }

components.name: Print Marks (Frame)
components.description: Signature L-shaped registration marks at canvas corners. Carries the 'this is being prepared for print' voice without adding shadow vocabulary.
components.css: .ds-frame { position: relative; width: 240px; height: 240px; padding: 0; } .ds-frame__inner { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: oklch(12% 0.01 42); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(24% 0.018 42); } .ds-frame__mark { position: absolute; width: 14px; height: 14px; pointer-events: none; } .ds-frame__mark::before, .ds-frame__mark::after { content: ''; position: absolute; background: oklch(66% 0.16 28); } .ds-frame__mark::before { width: 14px; height: 1px; } .ds-frame__mark::after { width: 1px; height: 14px; } .ds-frame__mark--tl { top: -22px; left: -22px; } .ds-frame__mark--tl::before { top: 13px; left: 0; } .ds-frame__mark--tl::after  { top: 0; left: 13px; } .ds-frame__mark--tr { top: -22px; right: -22px; } .ds-frame__mark--tr::before { top: 13px; right: 0; } .ds-frame__mark--tr::after  { top: 0; right: 13px; } .ds-frame__mark--bl { bottom: -22px; left: -22px; } .ds-frame__mark--bl::before { bottom: 13px; left: 0; } .ds-frame__mark--bl::after  { bottom: 0; left: 13px; } .ds-frame__mark--br { bottom: -22px; right: -22px; } .ds-frame__mark--br::before { bottom: 13px; right: 0; } .ds-frame__mark--br::after  { bottom: 0; right: 13px; }

narrative.overview:
The interface looks like the artwork it produces. Crude on purpose. Mono-typed labels, square edges, raw rules. The screen is dark because the user is in a bedroom studio at 1am, laptop open, ambient screen-light only, making something weird on purpose. Restraint here is not minimalism for safety; it is the chassis of a mixing board, where every control earns its place.

The system rejects three things by name. It rejects the overdesigned dev-tool aesthetic: neon gradients, crypto-bro purple, glowing grids. It rejects generic SaaS neutrality (Canva, Adobe Express): polished, corporate-safe, identity-free. And it rejects any palette someone could guess from the domain alone. The accent color is a warm red-orange, not a tech-blue or a creator-purple, and it is used like a printer's registration mark: rare, deliberate, load-bearing.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, warm-tinted neutrals (chroma 0.012–0.022, hue 42–68); never pure #000 or #fff
One accent (oklch(66% 0.16 28)), used on ≤10% of any screen
Square corners by default; small radii (2–9px) reserved for native form affordances (sliders, sortable rows)
Mono for UI text, condensed display for headlines; no body serif anywhere
Clamp-based fluid spacing; no spacing scale tokens — rhythm comes from contrast between hair (4px) and bay (clamp 48–112px)
Mobile is first-class; touch targets at 44px minimum

rules.name: The Registration-Mark Rule
rules.body: The accent is a registration mark, not a brand wash. It appears on ≤10% of any screen — current-step indicator, active chip, primary CTA, layer numerals. If two or more accent uses are within thumb's reach of each other, one is decoration. Remove it.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral carries 0.012–0.022 chroma along the 42–68 hue band. Pure gray is forbidden. Pure black is forbidden. Pure white is forbidden. The screen should read as a warm-tinted dark, like newsprint at night.

rules.name: The Mono-As-UI Rule
rules.body: All UI chrome — buttons, labels, eyebrows, meta, filter chips — uses mono. Display is reserved for headlines. Mixing display in chrome makes the UI shout. Mixing mono in headlines makes the work feel like a terminal print, not a record sleeve.

rules.name: The Caps-And-Tracking Rule
rules.body: Anything in caps under 1rem must carry letter-spacing ≥ 0.12em. Anything in caps over 2rem must carry tracking −0.015em or tighter. Caps without tracking adjustments read as accidental, not intentional.

rules.name: The Flat-Tonal Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Depth comes from one-step lightness shifts in the neutrals (8% → 11% → 24%) and from hairline 1px borders. Drop shadows are forbidden for resting elevation.

rules.name: The Print-Mark Rule
rules.body: When a surface needs to feel framed, use crop / registration marks at the corners (1px lines, 14–18px arms, accent-colored), not a box-shadow. The work is being prepared for print; the chrome should say so.

dos: Do keep the accent on ≤10% of any screen. Treat it like a registration mark: rare and load-bearing.
Do use mono (ui-monospace) for every UI label, button, eyebrow, and meta line.
Do use Barlow Condensed 900 for headlines. ALL CAPS, tightened tracking on large sizes (≥2rem → tracking −0.015em).
Do layer depth through tonal shifts in the warm-tinted darks (8% → 11% → 24%) and hairline 1px borders.
Do square the corners. Reserve small radii (2–9px) for native form affordances only.
Do treat the seed number as identity. Display it in mono meta, ALL CAPS, with a # prefix.
Do ship a 44px minimum touch target on every interactive element.
donts: Don't use overdesigned dev-tool aesthetics: neon gradients, crypto-bro purple, glowing grid backgrounds, glassmorphism, or stacked decorative effects in the chrome.
Don't ship anything that reads as generic 'modern' SaaS: Canva-flat, Adobe-Express-friendly, identity-free.
Don't use a palette someone could guess from the domain alone. The accent is intentionally not crypto-purple, not tech-blue, not creator-purple.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as a colored accent). Selected layer rows use a 1px hairline, not a 2–4px stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text over a gradient). Emphasis is by weight, scale, and ALL CAPS — never by gradient.
Don't put drop shadows on resting surfaces. Use tonal layering and 1px borders.
Don't mix display into UI chrome (buttons, labels). Display is reserved for headlines.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Every neutral carries 0.012–0.022 chroma along the warm 42–68 hue band.
Don't modal a flow that fits inline. A modal is the lazy answer; the generator opens as a route, the examples remix opens by deep-linking the doc into the generator.
